description: Human-readable stable key for selector and QA.
Factory layer, for example L1_core_body or L5_facet_precision.
V2 module key, module_00 through module_10.
Role of the copy, e.g. user_visible_body, title, boundary, schema_example.
User-visible body. Schema examples must not be production copy.
Only one item from same group unless explicitly allowed.
Allowed surfaces. Schema examples must use [] and not runtime surfaces.
Author-side quality metadata, not final QA.
Source document, batch and reviewer trace.
